data.description: Data to summarize. For traces: {trace, hierarchy}. For events: {event}.

mode.description:
Summary detail level: 'minimal' for 3-5 points, 'detailed' for 5-10 points

* `minimal` - minimal
* `detailed` - detailed

model.description: LLM model to use (defaults based on provider)

summarize_type.description:
Type of entity to summarize

* `trace` - trace
* `event` - event
